jobs.title: Python Software Engineer
jobs.description: We are looking for a Python Software Engineer to join our team. You'll work on scalable web applications and microservices.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Join our ML team to build cutting-edge AI models. Experience with transformers and LLMs is a plus.

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Analyze complex datasets and build predictive models. Strong statistical background required.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: Build end-to-end features from database to UI. Fast-paced environment with lots of growth opportunities.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Manage and scale our cloud infrastructure. AWS certification preferred.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: Create beautiful, responsive user interfaces. Design sensibility is a plus.

jobs.title: Backend Developer
jobs.description: Build robust backend systems handling millions of requests. Strong CS fundamentals required.

jobs.title: Mobile App Developer
jobs.description: Develop cross-platform mobile applications. Flutter experience highly valued.

jobs.title: Cloud Architect
jobs.description: Design and lead cloud migration projects. 8+ years experience preferred.

jobs.title: NLP Engineer
jobs.description: Work on state-of-the-art NLP models. PhD in NLP or related field preferred.

jobs.title: Junior Data Analyst
jobs.description: Entry-level position for recent graduates. Training provided.

jobs.title: Security Engineer
jobs.description: Protect our systems and data. Security certifications (CISSP, CEH) preferred.
